channel.title: +Articles on काव्ये विश्वासटिप्पन्यः
channel.description: Recent content in +Articles on काव्ये विश्वासटिप्पन्यः

item.title: AruNa yogirAja 2022
item.description: Source: TW Arun Yogiraj: Still Life APRIL 2022 Sophia Ann French MONK I WAS BORN into a Christian-Muslim home in India to parents who encouraged my curiosity for theology and ontology, and I began visiting temples in my teens, entranced by the magnitude of design in even the smallest shrines in India. Sculpting mūrtis is a ceremonial act, and the shilpi (sculptor) has to bring imagination to life using complex mathematical measurements prescribed in the Vedic canon.
